_meta.schema_notes: Fields align 1:1 with design_principles.yaml keys consumed by image_service.py. layout_type and info_band_style are enums. All rule fields ≤15 words. footer_backing/text_primary_hex are exact hex. best_used_for and mood are retained from v1 for curation.

ads.lighting: Warm orange sunset backlight; city haze horizon; golden rim light on female figure
ads.subject_rule: Female silhouette left-frame facing city at 30–75% vertical; egg chair right foreground
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline + subhead float upper-center in bright sky zone at 15–45% vertical; specs in footer
ads.type_treatment: Italic display serif headline; script accent word; geometric sans for spec footer pipe-row
ads.branding_treatment: Dual boxed logos top-left + top-right; contrasting brand styles; 3% inset
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Egg chair as aspirational prop elevates lifestyle read beyond square footage
ads.camera_notes: Wide-angle interior balcony looking outward; ~28mm equivalent; low perspective

ads.lighting: Warm orange-gold sunset; cinematic city dusk gradient; warm balcony ambient spill
ads.subject_rule: Female figure center-frame holding wine glass; physically integrated inside giant letter 'O'
ads.negative_space_rule: Monumental 'MONARCH' spans full canvas width at 50% vertical; figure occupies letterform gap
ads.type_treatment: Monumental ultra-bold display sans; figure inside 'O' letterform; project logotype below; white + amber
ads.branding_treatment: Developer logo top-right; project logotype centered above amber footer strip
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Human figure integrated into letterform — typography becomes architecture, not decoration
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level profile; 85mm compressed telephoto; figure lit by sunset against city-glow backdrop

ads.lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro; high-contrast architectural shadows; cool overhead vs warm floor spill
ads.subject_rule: Female seated center-left; candid chai moment; not posed; architecture remains dominant
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline floats upper-center in dark ceiling zone at 25–45% vertical; rounded pill at bottom 12%
ads.type_treatment: Display serif with italic on key word; mixed-size hook + keyword + continuation; mixed-case white
ads.branding_treatment: Dual logos top-corners; RERA code right edge vertical; all clear of text zones
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Conversational interrupt headline + chai cup moment — understated over declarative luxury
ads.camera_notes: Slight low angle; wide-angle 24mm equivalent; double-height interior with mezzanine visible

ads.lighting: Rich golden hour backlight through panoramic windows; warm amber interior; bedding warm-spill
ads.subject_rule: Couple backlit at window; intimate silhouette; bed + soft furnishings ground domestic warmth
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline cluster lower-center at 55–70% vertical over warm mid-tone zone; address at very bottom edge
ads.type_treatment: Italic script accent word ('Sunlight') embedded within sans headline; hashtag in tracked mono; warm white
ads.branding_treatment: Project name top-left bold sans; developer logo bottom-right in natural dark corner
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Sunlight-through-window as romantic silhouette — sells the feeling of morning, not the spec
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 35mm equivalent; wide bedroom with floor-to-ceiling windows center-frame

ads.lighting: Deep dusk; purple-orange dramatic sky; candle + pool glow; warm amber foreground
ads.subject_rule: Couple on lounge lower-left at 75–90% vertical; pool stretches to city; not scene-dominant
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline floats right-center in open sky at 30–55% vertical; config + address in dark footer
ads.type_treatment: Bold mixed-case sans headline; italic hashtag; tracked geometric sans for footer config + address
ads.branding_treatment: Project name top-left; developer logo bottom-right within footer bar
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Full city panorama from rooftop pool — floating above the city, not merely viewing it
ads.camera_notes: Low-angle wide exterior; 24mm equivalent; rooftop pool with infinity edge toward city

ads.lighting: City twilight blue hour; warm lantern + balcony ambient; couple lit vs cool sky
ads.subject_rule: Couple semi-reclined on daybed with city panorama; lanterns + plants as foreground props
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 28%: dark navy zone for location pill + headline + subhead; bottom 28%: dark zone for icon strip + price + CTA
ads.type_treatment: Bold gold serif headline at 40% canvas width; tracked all-caps location pill; large bold gold price; CTA pill
ads.branding_treatment: No standalone logo; location pill functions as identity anchor; top zone = identity zone
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Strict three-zone symmetry (dark/photo/dark) is editorial magazine structure — intent signals premium
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level exterior balcony; 35mm equivalent; wide balcony with city panorama behind couple

ads.lighting: Theatrical dark composite; city at night through architectural arch; stage-lit dramatic
ads.subject_rule: Female figure back-to-viewer framed by arch opening; city backdrop; figure as viewer proxy
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 35%: dark zone for headline + 4-logo icon grid; mid 40%: photo; bottom 25%: stat + tagline
ads.type_treatment: Tracked all-caps serif headline; gold accent serif for project names; monumental number at bottom; bullet-spaced tagline
ads.branding_treatment: Developer logo top-right; four project logos in strict horizontal icon grid at top-center
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Arch-framed figure as viewer proxy — theatrical reveal of development from behind the subject
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level through architectural arch; wide; female figure centered in the portal frame

ads.lighting: Warm ambient office light; herringbone floor warm up-light; sculptural gold key object lower-left
ads.subject_rule: Two figures center foreground reviewing tablet; professional; faces visible but not dominant
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline upper-left in natural ceiling/wall zone: mixed-scale stacked type; gold footer bar at bottom
ads.type_treatment: Mixed scale: small script 'The' + bold caps 'NEW ENTERPRISE' + contrasting script 'Era'; editorial drama
ads.branding_treatment: Project logo top-left; developer logo top-right; RERA registration in top corner text
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Mixed-scale typographic drama (script + caps) + gold desk prop creates editorial luxury
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 24mm equivalent; wide office space with herringbone floor vanishing point

ads.lighting: Purple-blue dusk; city panorama below; warm terrace ambient; romantic couple lighting
ads.subject_rule: Couple on terrace seating; ultra-high altitude cues city below as power signal
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 20%: dark semi-opaque header for headline; middle: photo; bottom 15%: dark zone specs + payment
ads.type_treatment: Tracked all-caps bold serif headline; large 'LUXURY LIVING' at ~50% scale; spec row tracked geometric sans
ads.branding_treatment: Developer logo top-left with project name stacked below
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Altitude of terrace shown at city scale — viewpoint communicates address hierarchy better than copy
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level exterior terrace; 35mm equivalent; extremely high floor; city panorama below

ads.lighting: Overhead flat natural daylight; saturated green lawn; warm family skin tones; no harsh shadows
ads.subject_rule: Family of three supine on lawn; direct eye contact with viewer from aerial POV; centered
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline upper-left over green backdrop at 5–20% vertical; 7-icon strip bottom 12%; location + logo footer
ads.type_treatment: Bold mixed-case sans headline; italic subhead; icon strip in gold line-art with light sans cap labels
ads.branding_treatment: Developer logo top-right; project logo mid-right; footer holds project + tagline text
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Overhead top-down family on grass — emotional intimacy from unexpected POV; belonging over aspiration
ads.camera_notes: True overhead bird's-eye; drone shot or very high crane; family looking up makes eye contact

ads.lighting: Warm late afternoon golden hour; green landscape backlit; wooden prop frame creates depth
ads.subject_rule: Family group (4 people) at outdoor patio; full faces visible; relaxed lifestyle, not staged
ads.negative_space_rule: Headline spans upper 20% in natural sky zone; location pill center-left in scene; icon strip + footer at bottom 15%
ads.type_treatment: Bold condensed sans headline with vertical gold border rule left; gold line-art icon strip; green brand footer
ads.branding_treatment: Top-left; leaf-motif logo; modest scale; website + location in footer bar
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Giant wooden location-pin prop creates placemaking signal — not generic green field
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level exterior; 35mm equivalent; family at outdoor furniture; architectural prop (location pin) left

ads.lighting: Deep chiaroscuro; candlelight + pendant globe glow; warm brown-black ambient; partial illumination
ads.subject_rule: Couple at bar table, back views, city through dark windows; intimate nocturnal scene
ads.negative_space_rule: Left 40% = natural dark zone from architecture; full vertical text column runs top-to-bottom within it
ads.type_treatment: Gold bold all-caps 'BECOMES' dominant; script 'Everyday'; small tracked sans intro; ornate diamond separators
ads.branding_treatment: Logo top of left text column; URL bottom of same column; left column IS the identity zone
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Dark candlelit scene positions home as private venue — nightlife as daily life, not just residence
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 50mm compressed; couple in lounge seating; city dark through windows behind

ads.lighting: Warm artificial interior; textured slatted wood wall panels; amber-brown tones; feature pendants
ads.subject_rule: No human; interior bedroom close-up; wall art + feature lighting fixtures as design hero
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 55%: photo; bottom 45%: cream background with monumental 'LUXURY' + subhead + icon strip
ads.type_treatment: Ultra-wide 'LUXURY' spanning 95% canvas width in cream zone; gold brown tracked all-caps tagline below
ads.branding_treatment: Logo top-left in photo zone; small scale; clear of all text and photo subject
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Word LUXURY rendered so large it escapes the frame — text as architectural material, not caption
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 35mm equivalent; bedroom close-up with textured feature wall as primary surface

ads.lighting: Warm recessed ceiling lighting + multiple practical sources; Indian formal living room; amber dominant
ads.subject_rule: No human; formal Indian living room interior wide shot; traditional decor as hero
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 20%: dark brown solid zone for 'LUXURY LIVING REDEFINED' in gold; middle: photo; bottom: 4-icon + tagline
ads.type_treatment: Bold all-caps 'LUXURY LIVING' large + 'REDEFINED' tracked below on dark brown; 4-icon geometric sans strip
ads.branding_treatment: No distinct standalone logo visible in image
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Warm recessed lighting + Indian formal styling signals heritage luxury, not imported contemporary
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level symmetrical interior; 28mm equivalent; one-point perspective through formal sitting room

ads.lighting: Warm interior ambient + ceiling fixtures; open kitchen visible behind; modern modular styling
ads.subject_rule: No human; interior design showcase; open-plan kitchen + living; multiple thresholds visible
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 55%: photo; bottom 45%: white background with headline + 4-icon strip + services tagline bar
ads.type_treatment: Bold sans headline; italic gold third line; 4-column icon strip with caps labels + sub-labels below each
ads.branding_treatment: Top-left logo; ornate gold wordmark; prominent scale; contact strip at very bottom
ads.what_makes_it_premium: White lower half provides breathing room — structured split lets the product speak uncompeted
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 24mm wide-angle; deep focal length emphasizing interior volume through thresholds

ads.lighting: Warm amber interior; soft ceiling + bedside lighting; city view through window as backdrop
ads.subject_rule: Female figure right-frame at 30–80% vertical, standing at window, back view; warmth primary signal
ads.negative_space_rule: Small headline at top 10%; location name monumental centered at 15–35%; left text stack; bottom icon strip
ads.type_treatment: Location name very large bold serif spanning ~80% canvas width; small headline above; gold price pill with border
ads.branding_treatment: No explicit logo; location name at monumental scale functions as sole brand element
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Location name as monumental visual anchor — address-as-identity is the luxury signal
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 35mm equivalent; square 1:1 format; bedroom with window city view on right

ads.lighting: Warm interior; golden hour window panorama; woman seated on bed; soft bedroom ambient
ads.subject_rule: Female figure seated on bed right-frame; left 35% frame naturally dark enough for text column
ads.negative_space_rule: Left 35% column: headline small + location name large + config + sqft + price gold pill; bottom bar CTA
ads.type_treatment: Location name in large gold bold caps occupying left column; specs in tracked geometric sans below; gold pill
ads.branding_treatment: No standalone logo; footer bar with CTA text only
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Gold price pill with border frames number as privileged disclosure, not just information
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 35mm equivalent; square 1:1 format; bedroom window view dominant right side

ads.lighting: Warm amber luxury interior; dramatic pendant lighting; marble coffee table; rich warm furnishings
ads.subject_rule: No human figure; interior wide shot; warm amber tones create aspirational domestic warmth
ads.negative_space_rule: Top 25%: dark zone for tagline + monumental location name; mid: photo; bottom: cream 3-col strip + footer
ads.type_treatment: Location name very large gold serif at top; tagline small tracked sans above; badge black box; strip geometric sans
ads.branding_treatment: No developer logo; project identity IS the location name at scale
ads.what_makes_it_premium: Cream-backed spec strip reads as luxury product card, not ad — receipt-of-facts clarity
ads.camera_notes: Eye-level interior; 28mm equivalent; square 1:1 format; one-point perspective through living room

layout_skeletons.summary: 5 dominant structural archetypes discovered across 18 ads

skeletons.name: Photo-First Floating Text
skeletons.description: Full-bleed photo fills 80–95% of canvas. Typography floats in naturally occurring dark zones — open sky, shadow pools, dark floor planes, ceiling voids. No manufactured backing panels. Logo in one corner only. Spec text minimal or absent.
skeletons.key_discipline: Scene must have a naturally dark zone — sky, shadow, floor — before text is assigned. If the scene has no dark zone, choose a different skeleton.
skeletons.premium_signal: Text floats like captions on a gallery wall — dignified, not desperate

skeletons.name: Dark Triptych (Header + Photo + Footer)
skeletons.description: Canvas divided into three horizontal zones: solid dark zone top (15–35%) + full photo center + solid dark zone bottom (10–25%). Top holds identity/headline, center is uninterrupted photography, bottom is conversion zone (specs, price, CTA). Zones never overlap.
skeletons.key_discipline: The photo zone must be 100% uninterrupted — no text, no badges. All copy lives in the solid bands.
skeletons.premium_signal: Editorial magazine structure — strict zoning signals design intent, not improvisation

skeletons.name: Solid Footer Container
skeletons.description: Full photo occupies top 75–82% of canvas. Solid dark or branded footer strip at bottom 18–25%. Footer is the ONLY conversion zone (config, price, phone, CTA). Photo is the aspiration; footer is the transaction.
skeletons.key_discipline: Footer max 20% canvas height — never a mid-frame panel. One-line spec strip only.
skeletons.premium_signal: Clear aspiration/transaction separation — the photo earns the click, the footer closes it

skeletons.name: Horizontal Structured Split
skeletons.description: Hard horizontal cut at 50–60% of canvas height. Top half: photo or visual. Bottom half: solid white, cream, or dark background with ALL copy organized in a structured grid (headline + icon strip + tagline bar). Zones never bleed into each other.
skeletons.key_discipline: The split line must be architecturally clean — a hard edge, not a gradient fade. Bottom zone must have sufficient height (≥40%) to breathe.
skeletons.premium_signal: Photo-as-product-hero above clean data zone — mimics luxury product advertising (fragrance, watches)

skeletons.name: Dark-Left Editorial Column
skeletons.description: Full-bleed photo fills canvas. Natural dark zone from architecture (dark wall, shadow, dark interior) occupies left 30–40% vertically. All text runs as a top-to-bottom column within that zone: logo → location → headline → specs → CTA. Right 60% of the photo is clean.
skeletons.key_discipline: The dark column must emerge from the scene's architecture — a naturally dark wall or shadow. Manufactured dark overlays read as sidebar panels, which undermine the premium feel.
skeletons.premium_signal: Restraint on the right side gives the photo room; the left column reads as a calm, structured editorial sidebar

schema_to_recipe_mapping.note: Use these mappings to translate an ad analysis entry into a design_principles.yaml recipe
schema_to_recipe_mapping.lighting: Maps directly to design_principles.yaml recipe.lighting (≤15 words)
schema_to_recipe_mapping.subject_rule: Maps directly to design_principles.yaml recipe.subject_rule (≤15 words)
schema_to_recipe_mapping.negative_space_rule: Maps directly to design_principles.yaml recipe.negative_space_rule (≤15 words)
schema_to_recipe_mapping.type_treatment: Maps directly to design_principles.yaml recipe.type_treatment (≤15 words)
schema_to_recipe_mapping.archetype: Maps to design_principles.yaml recipe.scene_types as: lifestyle_private_retreat→lifestyle_single, lifestyle_social_home→lifestyle_social, interior_signature_moment→interior, exterior_establishing_shot→exterior
schema_to_recipe_mapping.best_used_for: Curation signal for variant assignment — not sent to image model
schema_to_recipe_mapping.mood: Curation signal for tone matching — not sent to image model
